message:
fix: clean up pre-existing phantom DBs in tests expecting StatusOK (bd-8we)

TestCheckPhantomDatabases_OK and TestCheckPhantomDatabases_NilConfig could
fail when other tests sharing the same Dolt server left behind databases
matching beads_* or *_beads patterns. Added cleanupAllPhantomDBs helper
that drops any pre-existing phantom databases before asserting clean state.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
